name: Mizoram PSC – Assistant Grade, Upper Division Clerk – 65 Posts

basic_details.job_title: Mizoram PSC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 65 Assistant Grade, UDC Posts
basic_details.short_information: Mizoram PSC Recruitment 2026 announces 65 vacancies for Assistant Grade, UDC posts. Eligible candidates with Any Bachelors Degree can apply online from 12-05-2026 to 19-06-2026 through the official Mizoram PSC website, mpsc.mizoram.gov.in.
basic_details.organization_name: Various Departments of Government of Mizoram

age_limit.age_details: As per Government of Mizoram rules

salary_details.pay_scale: Assistant Grade: Level-7 | UDC: Level-6 (Pay Matrix 7th CPC)

selection_process: Written Examination + Document Verification + Mizo Language Proficiency Test (wherever applicable)
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the Mizoram Public Service Commission online portal (https://mpsconline.mizoram.gov.in/). No other mode of application will be accepted. The online portal is active from 12-05-2026 to 19-06-2026 (up to 4:00 PM). New users must complete one-time registration before 19-06-2026 (4:00 PM).
seo_tags: Mizoram Public Service Commission Assistant Grade
